历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2023, the lowest science ranking was approximately 117th; in 2024, it significantly advanced to about 97th; in 2025, it fell back to around 108th. The fluctuations over the past three years are evident, with a baseline ranking of about 108th in 2025. The provincial science enrollment plan was 13 in 2023, 13 in 2024, and 12 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is only 7, a sharp reduction of about 41.7% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 6th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly in the top tier nationally. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (cafeteria and dormitory public opinion), but the overall impact is limited. Douyin popularity ranks 17th (high heat), with high short video exposure, and application attention continues to rise. Computer Science and Technology (A+), Physics (A+), Mathematics (A), Electronic Science and Technology (A), Software Engineering (A), and AI-related disciplines are top-tier, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer and Electronic Information/Communication majors are highly recommended with high social heat; AI is cautiously observed. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Ningxia is about 66,000, roughly the same as in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 108th, the sharp enrollment reduction of about 41.7% in 2026 leading to intensified competition, and the sustained high heat of popular majors like Computer Science attracting high-scoring students, the lowest ranking in 2026 is expected to significantly advance. The predicted lowest ranking is about 78th, with a range of 48–108th.

Nanjing University's Physics Category sees a significant enrollment reduction in 2026, intensifying competition, so applicants should fully assess their ranking advantages.
